text.content:
DM tool. A mood map for the session. No audio files ship with this module — supply your own or licensed tracks and wire them into Foundry's Playlists, then trigger per scene. The goal is just the right emotional register at each beat.

Scene / MomentMoodWhat to reach for
Cemetery of Ash (explore)Bleak, hollow, lonelyLow drones, distant wind, sparse strings.
Iudex Gundyr (boss)Solemn, building dreadSlow choral / cello boss theme; swell when the Pus of Man erupts.
Firelink Shrine (hub)Calm, melancholy, safeSoft solo harp / piano; the one place to breathe.
High Wall & Courtyard (explore/farm)Tense, ruined, watchfulAmbient unease; rising percussion when hollows swarm.
Dragon Bridge (hazard)Awe + dangerHuge low brass on the fire rake; silence in the lulls.
Outrider Knight (mini-boss)Fast, relentlessDriving strings/percussion; no breathing room.
Pus of Man (mini-boss)Grotesque, panickedDissonant stabs, wet low textures; relief when fire lands.
Vordt of the Boreal Valley (boss)Frozen menace → frenzyStately frost theme in P1; tempo and intensity spike at 50% (P2).
Generic combatDriving tensionA loopable battle bed for trash fights.
Victory / boss downEarned reliefA short triumphant sting, then back to ambient.
"YOU DIED"Gut-punch, then resolveA heavy hit + silence; the iconic two-word beat. Let it land before play resumes.

Running it

  • Make a Foundry Playlist per mood; set boss themes to not-loop or loop deliberately.
  • Keep a one-shot "YOU DIED" sound on a hotbar macro for instant punctuation.
  • Free/CC audio: Tabletop Audio, incompetech (Kevin MacLeod), Pixabay Music, FreePD. Check each licence; none of these are FromSoftware tracks.
